title: Saudi Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful lamb stew inspired by Saudi Arabian cuisine. Perfect for a cold winter evening.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb and brown on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the lamb and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and sauté the onion and garlic until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the cumin and coriander, cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomatoes, potatoes, and carrots, cook for 5 minutes.
Return the lamb to the pot, season with salt and pepper.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2 1/2 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
